projects.headline: Work that builds feeling first.
projects.intro: Pinart brings together creative direction, design and the development of ideas into cohesive visual systems. It doesn't chase trends — it finds the tone that belongs to the brand.

serviceDetail.label: Service
serviceDetail.workTitle: Projects that show how we work.

direction.lede: Visual strategy and direction — from brand concept to consistent execution across every touchpoint.
direction.processTitle: Four steps — from idea to execution.

01.title: Understand the brand
01.desc: A short, sharp brief that surfaces tone, ambition and milestones. I don't guess — I ask.

02.title: Set the direction
02.desc: Strategy, mood, first visual language. Everything else follows from this.

03.title: Lead the execution
03.desc: I work with a team (designers, photographers, developers) — as the conductor.

04.title: Keep it consistent
04.desc: Brand book, systems, guidelines. So the brand works without me.

direction.whyTitle: Why trust me with creative direction?

01.title: I see the whole
01.desc: From logo to campaign copy — I think design and communication at once.

02.title: I lead teams
02.desc: I work with developers, photographers and writers — projects run without translation loss.

03.title: Lasting identity
03.desc: I don't chase trends. Every brand I've built still works today.

branding.lede: Identity systems — logo, palette, typography, voice and brand book that make a brand recognisable.
branding.processTitle: Branding isn't just a logo. It's a system.

01.title: Understand the story
01.desc: Who are you? Who are you speaking to? Why will they remember you?

02.title: Build the mark
02.desc: Logo, palette, typography — brand DNA in a few elements.

03.title: Extend the system
03.desc: How the brand performs on a business card, poster, screen, package.

04.title: Pack it into a book
04.desc: Brand book or CGP — so the team can continue without me.

01.title: System, not just a picture
01.desc: Logo is the start. The system is what keeps a brand recognisable for years.

02.title: Collaborative
02.desc: The brand isn't built from my taste — it grows from our conversation.

03.title: Print + digital + product
03.desc: Every brand thought across all media at once. Not separately per channel.

graphic.lede: Editorial layouts, visual communication, campaign visuals — design that carries content.
graphic.processTitle: Design that doesn't overpower the message.

01.title: Brief and content
01.desc: First I understand what I'm communicating, then I design.

02.title: Sketches and grid
02.desc: Hierarchy, grid, typography — the foundation of the layout.

04.title: Print or screen
04.desc: I prepare files for print (CMYK) or web (responsive).

01.title: Editorial precision
01.desc: From the 'More good restaurants' book to Molly Lolly — long-form experience.

02.title: Campaigns that hold up
02.desc: Not just pretty — consistent across many formats.

03.title: I understand print
03.desc: Working with printers since 2008. I know what colour does on paper.

marketing.lede: A strategic approach to communication — campaigns that connect brands with people at the right moment.
marketing.processTitle: Marketing without throwing ideas at the wall.

01.title: Understand the goal
01.desc: What are we measuring? Brand awareness, sales, loyalty? No campaign without it.

02.title: Find the story
02.desc: What makes this brand different? Here the campaign concept is born.

03.title: Execution across channels
03.desc: Print, digital, social, TV — one message, adapted per medium.

04.title: Measure and adjust
04.desc: I don't guess what works. I look at the data and adapt.

01.title: Brand + marketing together
01.desc: A campaign isn't separate from identity — with me you get both connected.

02.title: National campaign experience
02.desc: Petrol, mBills, Vsestoritve — TV, billboards, social, all firsthand.

03.title: Audience understanding
03.desc: I don't communicate what I want to say — I communicate what the audience will get.

web.lede: Websites and apps that combine story, motion and precision — from concept to live launch.
web.processTitle: From sketch to live launch — without lost translations.

01.title: Discovery and strategy
01.desc: Who are the users? What do they need to achieve? What tone, what tempo?

02.title: UX + UI design
02.desc: Wireframes, prototypes in Figma — before any code. Saves weeks of work.

03.title: Development with my team
03.desc: I work with trusted developers (Next.js, React, GSAP). I lead so the build stays on brand.

04.title: Launch and support
04.desc: QA, performance, SEO basics. After launch I stay on for tweaks and long-term care.

web.whyTitle: Why entrust your web to Pinart.

01.title: Apps and websites — from CMS to native code
01.desc: On the web I work with WordPress and Shopify for catalogs, blogs and e-commerce, through Webflow and Framer for design-driven brochure sites, all the way to Next.js, React, GSAP and headless CMS systems (Sanity, Contentful) when the project demands full control. For apps, from FlutterFlow for quick MVPs, through React Native and Flutter for cross-platform, to Swift and Kotlin for native iOS/Android. Together we pick the stack based on budget, team and long-term maintenance.

02.title: I lead the team, not just sketch
02.desc: I understand how developers think and can translate design into code in shared language.

03.title: Brand-first build
03.desc: Every detail — animation, micro-interaction, font fallback — reflects the brand. Not just function.

ideas.lede: Strategic concept development — from the first spark to an executable idea we can actually build.
ideas.processTitle: Ideas that survive the path from thought to execution.

01.title: Shared thinking session
01.desc: Questions, challenges, context. Best ideas don't come alone — they emerge in conversation.

02.title: Diverge
02.desc: Many directions, no censorship. Many bad ones to reach a great one.

03.title: Converge
03.desc: Pick the strongest. Develop it into an executable concept.

04.title: Prepare for execution
04.desc: Brief, visuals, plan. Any team that gets it knows what to do next.

01.title: My own projects prove it
01.desc: Molly Lolly, Wish & Vibe — ideas I developed from scratch into actual products.

02.title: Strategy + aesthetics
02.desc: An idea is only strong if you can pitch and execute it. With me you get both.

03.title: Honesty
03.desc: If the idea doesn't work, I'll tell you. One good idea beats five half-baked ones.

about.body: I create digital experiences that combine storytelling, movement and atmosphere. Together with developers and creatives, I build modern websites, branding systems and visual experiences for brands that want character.

clients.heading: Clients
clients.desc: Working with founders, teams and organisations to create brands, products and digital experiences that connect with people. Each collaboration is shaped by strategy, creativity and a shared ambition to build something meaningful.
